title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・どでけえ好敵手よ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One pushes past her own limits and conquers
the autumn Tenno Sho. She's congratulated on a
great run by Tamamo Cross herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap also seems inspired, as she and Inari
One make a passionate promise to race again at
next year's autumn Tenno Sho.
